_comment: Seed entries for the Nebius Dev Advocates directory. Imported by apps/web/prisma/seed.ts on first deploy. Replace the PLACEHOLDER entries with real advocate profiles before public launch.

advocates.name: Colin
advocates.title: Lead Developer Advocate, Nebius
advocates.bio: Colin runs the Nebius Builders Network and works with community ambassadors hosting events worldwide. Background: forward-deployed engineering, DevRel at multiple AI infra companies, organizer of countless dev meetups and hackathons. Based in San Francisco; happy to grab coffee with any Bay Area builder.
advocates._note: Add Calendly URL before public launch
